headline: Why Fertilizer Stocks Didn’t Sell Off on Iran Peace Deal Announcement
summary: CF Industries, Nutrien and Mosaic stocks were down on Monday following the news of a deal that would wind down the Iran war.

headline: BASF's Tinosorb S Gets FDA Nod as First New UV Filter in 27 Years
summary: BASFY's Tinosorb S wins FDA approval, bringing the first new UV filter to U.S. consumers in 27 years and broadening sun care options.
